mapper.select: SELECT 0 as company_count, 0 as company_change, 0.0 as internship_rate, 0 as internship_rate_change, 0 as approval_count, 0 as approval_count_change, 0 as resource_downloads, 0 as resource_downloads_change

SELECT CASE QUARTER(audit_time) WHEN 1 THEN '第一季度' WHEN 2 THEN '第二季度' WHEN 3 THEN '第三季度' WHEN 4 THEN '第四季度' END as label, COUNT(*) as value FROM company_users WHERE YEAR(audit_time) = #{year} AND audit_status = 1 AND audit_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CASE QUARTER(audit_time) WHEN 1 THEN '第一季度' WHEN 2 THEN '第二季度' WHEN 3 THEN '第三季度' WHEN 4 THEN '第四季度' END, QUARTER(audit_time) ORDER BY QUARTER(audit_time)

SELECT cu.id, cu.company_name, cu.audit_time, COALESCE(COUNT(p.id), 0) as position_count, COALESCE(SUM(p.recruited_count), 0) as admitted_count, CASE cu.status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 0 THEN '待审核' ELSE '未知' END as status, cu.company_tag FROM company_users cu LEFT JOIN position p ON cu.id = p.company_id WHERE cu.status = 1 AND cu.audit_status = 1 AND cu.audit_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cu.id, cu.company_name, cu.audit_time, cu.status, cu.company_tag ORDER BY cu.audit_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cu.id) FROM company_users cu WHERE cu.status = 1 AND cu.audit_status = 1 AND cu.audit_time IS NOT NULL

SELECT m.id, d.name as college, m.name as major_name, COUNT(su.id) as total_count, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (1, 2, 3) THEN 1 END), 0) as internship_count, CASE WHEN COUNT(su.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN sis.status IN (1, 2, 3) THEN 1 END), 0) * 100.0 / COUNT(su.id), 1) ELSE 0 END as internship_rate FROM major m LEFT JOIN department d ON m.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN student_users su ON m.id = su.major_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id GROUP BY m.id, d.name, m.name ORDER BY m.id LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) FROM major m

SELECT id, type, total_count, COALESCE(approved_count, 0) as approved_count, COALESCE(rejected_count, 0) as rejected_count, CASE WHEN total_count > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(approved_count, 0) * 100.0 / total_count, 1) ELSE 0 END as approval_rate FROM ( SELECT 1 as id, '自主实习申请' as type, COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count FROM student_application WHERE application_type = 'selfPractice'
UNION ALL
SELECT 2 as id, '单位变更申请' as type, COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count FROM student_application WHERE application_type = 'unitChange'
UNION ALL
SELECT 3 as id, '考研延迟申请' as type, COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count FROM student_application WHERE application_type = 'delay' ) as approval_data ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
